commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

issues.description: Weather emoji icon (line 75) lacks alt text — Icon component should have aria-label or title prop describing weather condition
issues.fix: Weather emoji icon (line 75) lacks alt text — Icon component should have aria-label or title prop describing weather condition

issues.description: Humidity icon (line 103) lacks alt text — Icon should have aria-label='Humidity indicator'
issues.fix: Humidity icon (line 103) lacks alt text — Icon should have aria-label='Humidity indicator'

issues.description: Wind speed icon (line 116) lacks alt text — Icon should have aria-label='Wind speed indicator'
issues.fix: Wind speed icon (line 116) lacks alt text — Icon should have aria-label='Wind speed indicator'

issues.description: Forecast day cards (lines 142-195) lack semantic structure — wrap each forecast card content in a proper region or use article role with aria-label for screen reader clarity
issues.fix: Forecast day cards (lines 142-195) lack semantic structure — wrap each forecast card content in a proper region or use article role with aria-label for screen reader clarity

issues.description: Weather emoji in forecast cards (line 167) lacks alt text — Icon should have aria-label describing the weather condition
issues.fix: Weather emoji in forecast cards (line 167) lacks alt text — Icon should have aria-label describing the weather condition

issues.description: Line 148-152: style object with custom CSS properties (flex, minWidth, textAlign) bypasses design system — use Card layout props or dedicated Stack/Row alignment props instead
issues.fix: Line 148-152: style object with custom CSS properties (flex, minWidth, textAlign) bypasses design system — use Card layout props or dedicated Stack/Row alignment props instead

evaluation.critique: The component correctly uses design tokens for colors and spacing throughout, and properly renders all data from props without hardcoding weather examples. However, the layout has minor issues: forecast cards use inline style with calc() instead of pure token-based sizing, the 5-day forecast strip doesn't guarantee a proper horizontal scrolling/grid layout on smaller screens, and missing hover/focus states on interactive cards reduces polish.
